description_long: This combat tactical vehicle is a futuristic, heavily fortified structure built atop a series of floating, rocky platforms interconnected by metallic bridges or cables. The central platform features a fortified command post with various equipment, antennas, and what appear to be defensive emplacements. Surrounding the main hub are three smaller, detached platforms, each with their own structural elements and possible defensive features. The surfaces are rugged and armored, with visible storage containers, barrels, and reinforced barriers providing additional protection. The overall design suggests a mobile or modular outpost, capable of withstanding significant assault and supporting multiple personnel. The color palette is dominated by dark, earthy tones, enhancing its stealth and tactical appearance.
description: A fortified, modular combat outpost built on interconnected floating rocky platforms, featuring armored barriers, defensive emplacements, and rugged equipment.
description_view_0: From this angle, the main command post and central platform are prominent, with two smaller platforms visible on either side connected by cables.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear of the central platform, showing more of the structural supports and a large, reinforced barrier at the frontmost platform.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the full spread of the floating platforms and the interconnected cables, with the command post and defensive structures clearly visible.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the back and side of the main platform, showing the storage containers, barriers, and the smallest floating platform in the distance.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Three visible weapon mounts: one on the central command post roof, and one each on two of the smaller platforms, appearing as turret or gun emplacements.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the central platform and reinforced barriers on the smaller platforms; modular and rugged in appearance.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark gray and brown coloration with no distinct camouflage pattern.
